[10-12] The text overlay changes to 'Dumplings' while the checkered background and faint circular stain remain constant. [14-26] A high-angle shot displays a clear glass bowl centered on a light wood grain surface, holding a central mound of white powder. During [14-16], the lighting brightens considerably, fully illuminating the flour pile and the wood texture beneath the transparent vessel, removing prior shadows. From [16-26], the shot remains static with the white powder undisturbed inside the vessel. Steady, bright lighting continues to highlight the flour's texture and the table beneath without any visible movement or alteration to the scene. [26-28] The scene cuts to a small lime-green bowl centered on a wooden surface, replacing a glass bowl of flour. Inside rest two scoops of a pale yellow, creamy substance with a smooth texture. [28-36] The static high-angle shot persists, featuring the small lime-green bowl on the light wood grain table.

From 36s to 46s, the static high-angle shot features a small lime-green bowl centered on a light wood grain table. Inside, two scoops of pale yellow, creamy substance remain undisturbed. Bright, even lighting highlights the smooth texture of the ingredient and the wooden surface. No movement, alterations, or interactions occur; the scene is entirely still, maintaining the same composition and lighting conditions throughout the duration.

[46-48] A beige plastic measuring cup filled with clear liquid appears centered on the wooden surface, handle pointing right. [48-50] The scene cuts to a clear glass bowl centered on the light wood grain surface, holding a central mound of white powder. [50-56] A hand enters from the bottom right holding a small lime-green bowl containing a pale yellow creamy substance. A wooden spoon scrapes the substance out of the green bowl, depositing it directly onto the flour inside the larger clear glass vessel. [56-58] The green bowl is removed. A hand wielding a wooden spoon starts to blend the ingredients, pushing the yellow mass into the flour mound centered on the wooden table.

[58-62] A hand uses a wooden spoon to vigorously mix a pale yellow substance into white flour inside a clear glass bowl, pushing and turning ingredients to break up the yellow mass. [62-66] A bare hand enters the bowl, replacing the spoon, and uses fingers to press and combine the yellow substance with the flour mixture directly, digging into the crumbly texture to work ingredients together. [66-68] The mixing action concludes, leaving a coarse, crumbly mixture of pale yellow and white ingredients inside the vessel. [68-70] A hand holds a small clump of the combined substance near the rim to showcase texture, then brings a beige plastic measuring cup into view over the bowl on the light wood grain surface.

[70-72] A hand holds a beige plastic measuring cup over a clear glass bowl containing a crumbly mixture, then removes it to resume manually mixing the pale yellow and white ingredients on a light wood surface. [72-78] Fingers press and turn the coarse mixture against the vessel's sides and bottom, making the texture increasingly uniform and cohesive as the hand kneads the dry and fatty components together. [78-82] The hand gathers the pale yellow crumbs in the center, consolidating the loose texture into larger clumps. The manual blending continues, causing the ingredients to appear more clumped and less distinct within the transparent container.

[10-12] The text overlay changes to 'Dumplings' while the checkered background and faint circular stain remain constant. From [16-26], the shot remains static with the white powder undisturbed inside the vessel. [94-96] A hand holds and shapes a small, rough ball of pale yellow dough above a clear glass bowl, separating it from the main consolidated mass resting below on a light wooden surface. [120-122] Inside a white pot, brown broth containing meat chunks and orange carrots simmers gently alongside multiple floating pale yellow dumplings. The camera remains static, showing the stew simmering with no new ingredients added.

The static close-up shot continues displaying the sealed pot. The black handle and central stem stay stationary. No movement or changes occur in the scene as the pot remains sealed throughout the duration.

[132-138] A static close-up shows a white pressure cooker lid featuring a black handle labeled "SAFETY LOCK" on the left, a central metal valve, and a small black weight. The pot remains sealed without movement. [138-144] The scene cuts to a high-angle shot of a lime-green square bowl on a wooden table. The bowl contains brown broth with pale dumplings, chunks of meat, and orange carrot pieces. The camera holds steady on the finished meal.
